summary: Tested 3 features: Backup Codes for All Users, RBAC on CRM/Inventory/Sales Dashboard, and God Mode New Actions. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend RBAC verified working for viewer role. God Mode dropdown shows all 8 actions including 4 new ones.

issues: Minor: Chart width/height warning in console - charts may not render properly on initial load

passed_tests: Backup Codes - Viewer can generate backup codes (POST /api/users/backup-codes/generate)
Backup Codes - Staff can generate backup codes
Backup Codes - Unauthenticated request blocked
Backup Codes Status - Viewer can check status (GET /api/users/backup-codes/status)
Backup Codes Status - Staff can check status
Backup Code Recovery - Viewer can recover with backup code (POST /api/auth/recover-with-backup-code)
Backup Code Recovery - Staff can recover with backup code
God Mode Impersonate - SuperAdmin can impersonate user
God Mode Impersonate - Non-existent user returns 404
God Mode Impersonate - Non-superadmin blocked
God Mode Change Role - SuperAdmin can change user role
God Mode Change Role - Invalid role rejected
God Mode Change Role - Non-existent user returns 404
God Mode Generate Backup Codes - SuperAdmin can generate codes for any user
God Mode Generate Backup Codes - Non-existent user returns 404
God Mode Delete Tenant Data - Requires confirm=true
God Mode Delete Tenant Data - Superadmin tenant deletion blocked
God Mode Delete Tenant Data - Non-existent tenant succeeds with 0 deleted
God Mode System Health - Returns stats (users, tenants, items, sales)
God Mode System Health - Non-superadmin blocked
UI: CRM Page - View-Only indicator shows for viewer role
UI: CRM Page - Add Customer button hidden for viewer
UI: Inventory Page - View-Only indicator shows for viewer role
UI: Inventory Page - Adjust Stock button hidden for viewer
UI: Sales Dashboard - View-Only indicator shows for viewer role
UI: God Mode - Modal opens with 'Select Action' dropdown
UI: God Mode - Impersonate User option present
UI: God Mode - Change User Role option present
UI: God Mode - Generate Backup Codes option present
UI: God Mode - Delete Tenant Data (DANGER!) option present

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All RBAC and God Mode UI features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features fully implemented and tested: 1) Backup codes now work for ALL users via /api/users/backup-codes/generate and /api/auth/recover-with-backup-code. 2) RBAC components (ReadOnlyBanner, ActionGuard) added to CRM, Inventory, and Sales Dashboard pages - viewer sees View-Only banner and action buttons are hidden. 3) God Mode enhanced with 4 new actions: Impersonate User, Change User Role, Generate Backup Codes, Delete Tenant Data (DANGER!). All APIs use Body(...) parameter format for target_user_id.

backup_codes_all_users.note: Works for viewer, staff, and all authenticated users

rbac_crm_page.action_guard: Add Customer button hidden for viewer

rbac_inventory_page.action_guard: Adjust Stock button hidden for viewer

god_mode_new_actions.impersonate: POST /api/superadmin/god-mode/impersonate - Returns access_token for target user
god_mode_new_actions.change_role: POST /api/superadmin/god-mode/change-role - Valid roles: admin, manager, staff, cashier, viewer
god_mode_new_actions.generate_backup_codes: POST /api/superadmin/god-mode/generate-backup-codes - Generates 10 codes for any user
god_mode_new_actions.delete_tenant_data: POST /api/superadmin/god-mode/delete-tenant-data - Requires confirm=true, blocks superadmin tenant
god_mode_new_actions.system_health: GET /api/superadmin/god-mode/system-health - Returns users, tenants, items, sales counts
